beginner.title: Python Fundamentals
tasks: Write a calculator program
Build a simple To-Do list CLI app
Parse a CSV file and compute averages
beginner.mini_project: Command-line Student Grade Tracker — reads marks from CSV, computes stats, prints report
beginner.milestone: Can write standalone Python scripts that read data, process it, and handle errors

intermediate.title: OOP, Modules & Data Processing
tasks: Build a class-based Bank Account system
Use Pandas to analyze a real dataset (Kaggle)
Write unit tests with pytest
intermediate.mini_project: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on Titanic or Iris dataset using Pandas and Matplotlib
intermediate.milestone: Can analyse real datasets, write object-oriented Python, and use common data libraries

advanced.title: Async, Testing, Performance & Packaging
tasks: Write an async web scraper with aiohttp
Profile and optimize a slow function
Publish a small package to TestPyPI
advanced.mini_project: Async REST API client that aggregates data from 3 public APIs concurrently
advanced.milestone: Can write production-ready Python: typed, tested, async-capable, and optimized

industry_ready.title: Production Python: CI/CD, APIs & Architecture
tasks: Deploy a FastAPI service in Docker
Set up GitHub Actions pipeline with tests
Implement JWT auth in a REST API
industry_ready.mini_project: Full REST API microservice with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Dockerized, with CI/CD pipeline
industry_ready.milestone: Can design, build, test, and deploy Python-based services to production

resources.name: TechWorld with Nana – Docker for Developers (YouTube)

beginner.title: SQL Basics — SELECT, WHERE, JOINs
tasks: Complete SQLZoo beginner track
Write 10 queries on a sample sales database
Create your own table and insert data
beginner.mini_project: Query a sample e-commerce database to answer 5 business questions (top products, revenue by region, etc.)
beginner.milestone: Can write basic SELECT with filters and joins on real tables

intermediate.title: Aggregations, Subqueries & Performance
tasks: Solve 20 HackerRank SQL challenges
Write a report using GROUP BY + HAVING
Rewrite a subquery as a CTE
intermediate.mini_project: Monthly sales analytics report using CTEs and window functions on a mock retail dataset
intermediate.milestone: Can write complex analytical queries for business reporting tasks

advanced.title: Window Functions, Normalization & Optimization
tasks: Solve window function problems on LeetCode
EXPLAIN a slow query and add an index
Normalize a denormalized dataset to 3NF
advanced.mini_project: Customer Cohort Retention Analysis using window functions in PostgreSQL
advanced.milestone: Can write advanced analytical SQL and diagnose/optimize slow queries

industry_ready.title: SQL in Production: DBT, Pipelines & Warehouses
tasks: Build a DBT model for a sample dataset
Connect Python to PostgreSQL using SQLAlchemy
Write a stored procedure for automated reporting
industry_ready.mini_project: End-to-end data pipeline: Python ingests CSV → PostgreSQL → DBT transforms → Tableau/Metabase dashboard
industry_ready.milestone: Can design and manage databases for production data pipelines

beginner.title: ML Concepts — Regression, Classification, Clustering
tasks: Predict house prices with linear regression
Classify Iris flowers with Decision Tree
Cluster mall customers with K-Means
beginner.mini_project: Titanic survival prediction using Logistic Regression and scikit-learn with full EDA
beginner.milestone: Can implement and evaluate basic ML algorithms on tabular datasets

intermediate.title: Feature Engineering, Ensembles & Model Evaluation
tasks: Build a full ML pipeline with preprocessing steps
Tune hyperparameters with GridSearchCV
Compare 5 models on the same dataset
intermediate.mini_project: Customer Churn Predictor using XGBoost with feature importance analysis and SHAP values
intermediate.milestone: Can build production-style ML pipelines with proper evaluation and model selection

advanced.title: Advanced Algorithms, Explainability & MLOps
tasks: Implement SHAP for a black-box model
Handle severe class imbalance with SMOTE
Build a time series forecasting model
advanced.mini_project: End-to-end fraud detection system with XGBoost, SMOTE, SHAP explainability, and model card
advanced.milestone: Can build and explain advanced ML models meeting data science interview standards

resources.name: Made With ML — ML Ops Basics

industry_ready.title: MLOps: Deployment, Monitoring & Serving
tasks: Track experiments with MLflow
Serve a model as a REST API with FastAPI
Containerize an ML model with Docker
industry_ready.mini_project: Production ML system: model trained, tracked with MLflow, served via FastAPI, containerized with Docker, with drift alert
industry_ready.milestone: Can deploy ML models to production with monitoring — TNP/interview ready

beginner.title: Arrays, Strings, Linked Lists & Complexity
tasks: Reverse a linked list
Solve 15 easy LeetCode array/string problems
Implement a stack using arrays
beginner.mini_project: Solve 30 LeetCode Easy problems — track patterns (two pointers, hash maps)
beginner.milestone: Can solve easy DSA problems and explain time/space complexity

intermediate.title: Trees, Graphs, Sorting & Recursion
tasks: Implement BFS and DFS from scratch
Solve 20 LeetCode medium tree problems
Implement quicksort and mergesort
intermediate.mini_project: Build a pathfinder visualizer (BFS on a grid) — a popular interview topic demo
intermediate.milestone: Can solve medium-level DSA problems in interview settings

advanced.title: DP, Heaps, Tries & Advanced Graph Algorithms
concepts: Dynamic programming patterns (0/1 knapsack, LCS, LIS)
tasks: Solve 10 DP problems on LeetCode
Implement Dijkstra for shortest path
Build a Trie and implement autocomplete
advanced.mini_project: Word Search & Autocomplete system using a Trie with BFS suggestion ranking
advanced.milestone: Can solve hard DSA problems and pass coding rounds at product companies

industry_ready.title: System Design DSA & Interview Mastery
concepts: Design patterns in OOP (used in SD)
tasks: Implement LRU Cache (HashMap + Doubly Linked List)
Do 5 mock coding interviews on Pramp
Solve 50 LeetCode problems across patterns
industry_ready.mini_project: Design and implement a URL shortener backend (hashing + storage) from scratch
industry_ready.milestone: Interview-ready: can solve problems under time pressure and communicate solutions clearly

beginner.title: Descriptive Stats, Probability & Distributions
concepts: Mean, median, mode, variance, std dev
tasks: Compute descriptive stats for a dataset in Python
Plot distributions with matplotlib
Identify outliers using IQR method
beginner.mini_project: Statistical report on a real dataset (e.g., COVID data) with plots and written conclusions
beginner.milestone: Can describe and visualize any dataset quantitatively with correct statistics

intermediate.title: Hypothesis Testing & Statistical Inference
tasks: Run a t-test comparing two groups in Python (scipy)
Calculate confidence intervals for a dataset
Design an A/B test experiment
intermediate.mini_project: A/B Test Analysis: statistical test whether a new landing page significantly improves conversion
intermediate.milestone: Can design and interpret statistical tests for data-driven decisions

advanced.title: Bayesian Statistics & Regression Analysis
tasks: Build a Bayesian model with PyMC3
Diagnose multicollinearity in a regression
Interpret regression coefficients fully
advanced.mini_project: Sales forecasting using multiple regression with full statistical validation (R², p-values, residuals)
advanced.milestone: Can perform advanced statistical modeling and interpret results in business context

industry_ready.title: Experimental Design & Applied Statistics
tasks: Calculate required sample size for an A/B test
Run a Mann-Whitney U test
Write a stakeholder-readable stats report
industry_ready.mini_project: End-to-end A/B test: design, simulate, analyze, and present results with confidence intervals
industry_ready.milestone: Can design experiments, analyze results, and communicate statistical findings to management

beginner.title: Neural Network Basics & Backpropagation
tasks: Build a 2-layer NN from scratch in NumPy
Train an MNIST digit classifier with Keras
Plot training/validation loss curves
beginner.mini_project: MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier with a 3-layer dense neural network in TensorFlow/Keras
beginner.milestone: Understands how neural networks learn and can train basic models

intermediate.title: CNNs, RNNs & Transfer Learning
tasks: Fine-tune ResNet50 on a custom image dataset
Build a sentiment classifier using LSTM
Apply dropout to reduce overfitting
intermediate.mini_project: Image Classifier using Transfer Learning (MobileNet) fine-tuned on a 5-class custom dataset with >90% accuracy
intermediate.milestone: Can apply CNN/RNN architectures and leverage pre-trained models for real tasks

advanced.title: Transformers, Attention & Generative Models
tasks: Fine-tune BERT for text classification
Generate images with a simple GAN
Use Hugging Face pipeline for NLP tasks
advanced.mini_project: Text Classification system using fine-tuned DistilBERT for 5-class news classification
advanced.milestone: Can work with state-of-the-art transformer models and generative architectures

industry_ready.title: DL Deployment, Optimization & Production
tasks: Export a PyTorch model to ONNX
Serve a model with TF Serving
Optimize inference time by 2x
industry_ready.mini_project: Deploy a fine-tuned BERT model as a REST API with FastAPI, ONNX runtime, containerized with Docker
industry_ready.milestone: Can take a DL model from Notebook to production serving

beginner.title: Chart Types & Matplotlib Basics
tasks: Reproduce 5 chart types from a dataset
Customize colors and fonts in matplotlib
Plot a time series with proper axis labels
beginner.mini_project: Visual report of a country's GDP/population data using 5 different chart types
beginner.milestone: Can create clear, well-labeled charts for any dataset

intermediate.title: Seaborn, Plotly & Interactive Dashboards
tasks: Build a correlation heatmap with seaborn
Create an interactive scatter plot with Plotly
Build a 2-page Streamlit app
intermediate.mini_project: Streamlit dashboard showing sales analytics with interactive filters (date range, region, product)
intermediate.milestone: Can build interactive analytical dashboards deployable from Python

advanced.title: BI Tools & Storytelling with Data
tasks: Build a Tableau/Power BI dashboard from scratch
Create a geo-map visualization
Present a data story to a non-technical audience

industry_ready.title: Production Dashboards & Data Products
tasks: Embed a Plotly chart into a FastAPI app
Connect Power BI to a live SQL database
Publish a Streamlit app to Streamlit Cloud

industry_ready.milestone: Can build and ship production-grade data products as a Data Analyst / BI Engineer

beginner.title: Containers vs VMs, Docker CLI & Dockerfile

Scan an image for vulnerabilities
